description: Trusty contains a vulnerability in NVIDIA OTE protocol message parsing code, which is present in all the TAs. An incorrect bounds check leads to a memory leak of a portion of the heap situated after a stream buffer.

product.name: NVIDIA Jetson, TX2 series, TX2 NX, AGX Xavier series, Xavier NX

enisaIdProduct.product_version: All Jetson Linux versions prior to r32.5.1
